sessionName: Threshold 3×8 min @ T + MHR retest (run only)
intro: W7 Wed threshold + MHR retest (Adj #46 Tue↔Wed swap — Hyp A was logged Tue 6/2; no lift today). §4.C W7 quality day: longer reps than W6 (3×8 vs 5×5), same locked 8:00/mi.

Run-MHR retest folded onto the end of this session (Adj #45/#9): after the 3×8 work + 3–5 min easy jog, run a max-HR finisher (treadmill 1%, 2–3 min progressive build, last 30–60 s flat-out) and capture peak HR. Treat it as a FLOOR — end-of-session fatigue may cap it; a fresh standalone 1500m all-out stays the gold-standard follow-up. If it confirms ≥195–205, recompute Z2 (85–88%) / Z3 (92–96%) and lift the off-191 Z1 cap.

Achilles read clean during/post Mon's run (Adj #44) — first non-reactive report since the flare, but the hold bar is an AM-clean read; calf 335 / hill-stride holds stay until then. Zoom Fly 6 OK for this short tempo if the Achilles tolerates; long/easy stays Vomero (Adj #34).

flags: Swap (Adj #46): threshold moved Tue → Wed; Tue was the no-run day this week. Default §2.A ordering (Tue T / Wed Hyp A) resumes W8.
Hold 8:00/mi — locked T pace (Adj #26, confirmed W6 Tue at RPE 7 / RIR 2). Don't drift to 8:05–8:10.
Anchor RPE + pace, not HR (Adj #9): off-191 zones skew low for running. T-effort HR will read high (W6 Tue peaked 183, W5 Tue 188) — expected, not over-threshold.
MHR retest finisher (Adj #45): treat the captured peak as a FLOOR; if ≥195–205, recompute Z2/Z3 per Adj #9.
Achilles / shoe: Zoom Fly 6 OK for this short tempo if tolerated; long/easy stays Vomero (Adj #34). Hold mileage while it settles (§11.D).
cardio.workout: 3×8 min @ T, 90 s jog recovery, treadmill 1% (or flat outdoor). Then 3–5 min easy jog → MHR finisher: treadmill 1%, 2–3 min progressive pace/grade build, last 30–60 s flat-out, capture peak HR.

targets.hr: expect ~178–185 on the reps; anchor by RPE 7 ("could do ~2 more"), not the off-191 zones (Adj #9)
targets.cadence: 175–182 spm (180 has been the consistent T read)

cardio.warmup: 1.0–1.5 mi easy building to T pace. Run it honestly — the W5 Tue cold-start (127→180 ramp, "quite hard") was a no-WU artifact; a proper opener kept W6 Tue's rep 1 at 167.
cardio.cooldown: After the MHR finisher: 1.0 mi easy / Z1 + SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1.
cues: Controlled opener — let HR sit ~167–172 on rep 1; climb across reps is normal cardiac drift.
8 min reps reward patience — hold 8:00, don't bank time early.
Nasal-check the recovery jogs — should clear to conversational by the 90 s.
Save something for the finisher — the retest needs a true max, not a drained one.

currentLoads.note: 145×5/4 RIR 0/0, then 140×4 RIR 0 — 145 bump missed (set 1 hit 5 reps but to failure, not RPE 7); §5 miss #1 → repeat 145 next Wed (two misses → cut TM). Top of LP; AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8 deload (Adj #47)
